message:
perf(webgpu): hoist render pass creation outside layer loop

Restructure the WebGPU draw path to create a single render pass with
one clear operation before iterating layers, instead of creating a new
render pass per vertex batch with clear-vs-load tracking.

Before: each non-empty vertex batch started a fresh render_pass with
either LoadOp::Clear (first batch) or LoadOp::Load (subsequent), plus
a fallback clear pass if no batches had vertices. This created N+1
render passes in the worst case.

After: one render pass is created upfront with LoadOp::Clear, vertex
buffers are drawn into it across all layers/indices, and the pass is
dropped before queue submission. Empty frames still get the initial
clear, eliminating the separate fallback clear pass entirely.

Removes the `cleared` tracking bool and ~30 lines of per-batch render
pass boilerplate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
